TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna ni-milling-igh ta ti Herodes ka sat ki vouel ki pahpat ki Meisasou ki pourough ki kakalauakau ti Jesus.
Tou kidi k'anna ni-millingigh ta ti Herodes ka sat ki vouel ki pahpat ki Meisasou ki pourough ki kakalauakau ti Jesus.
S.TRANS: Te dier selvez tijdt + hoorde Herodes de Dierwortt het geruchte ban Jely.
At that time Herod the tetrarch heard of the fame of Jesus,
那時，分封的王希律聽見耶穌的名聲，

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ki rarauwei tyn, Ti Joannes ka na Tama-æulough ta ti atta, Ni-pa-æhpyt-en ta teni ki ni-kapat-ei-an, ka alei ki atta peiraring-ei-en tyni-æn ta ka ilhg-en ka ringei.
Ka ni-k'ma ki rarauwei tyn, Ti Joannes ka na Tama-æulough ta ti atta, Ni-pa-æhpyt-en ta teni ki ni-kapatei-an, ka alei ki atta peiraring-ei-en tyni-æn ta ka ilhg-en ka ringei.
S.TRANS: Ende sepde tot syne knechten Dele is Joannes he Dooper: hy is opgeweckt ban de dooden ende daerom wercken die krachten in hem.
And said unto his servants, This is John the Baptist; he is risen from the dead; and therefore mighty works do shew forth themselves in him.
就對臣僕說：「這是施洗的約翰從死裏復活，所以這些異能從他裏面發出來。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-pa-tau ta ti Herodes ti Joannes-an, ni-pavæuut pa-pou-sang-at tyni-æn alei ti Herodias-an ka kei-en ki tæ'i-appara tyn ka ti Filippus.
Ka ni-pa-tau ta ti Herodes ti Joannes-an, ni-pavæuut pa-pou-sang-at tyni-æn alei ti Herodias-an ka kei-en ki tæ'i-appara tyn ka ti Filippus.
S.TRANS: Want Herodes hadde Joannem gebangen ghenomen ende hem gebonden eti in den kercke: geset om Hetodias de huysbrouwe Philippi shns broeders wille.
For Herod had laid hold on John, and bound him, and put him in prison for Herodias' sake, his brother Philip's wife.
起先，希律為他兄弟腓力的妻子希羅底的緣故，把約翰拿住，鎖在監裏。

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Joannes tyni-æn, Assi kow hahei-en mei'a tyni-æn.
Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Joannes tyni-æn, Assi kow hahei-en mei'a tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Want Joannes leyde tot hem Het en 18 u niet geoorloft harr te hebben,
For John said unto him, It is not lawful for thee to have her.
因為約翰曾對他說：「你娶這婦人是不合理的。」

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-kamoei-in tyn paka-patei tyni-æn ni-mahtakout ki ta'u, alei ka Tama-mattæi-tan ta teni ni-k'ma ta rÿh nein.
Ka rou ni-kamoei-in tyn paka-patei tyni-æn ni-mahtakout ki ta'u, alei ka Tama-mattæi-tan ta teni ni-k'ma ta rÿh nein.
S.TRANS: Ende willende hem dooden breelde hy het bolck om dat sy hem hielden boor ren Propheet.
And when he would have put him to death, he feared the multitude, because they counted him as a prophet.
希律就想要殺他，只是怕百姓，因為他們以約翰為先知。

S.FORM: ka tou wæ'i ki ou-vava-toug-an ki ni-pei-alak ta ti Hero-des, ni-rmang-toungtoul ta tatimi-in ti Herodias tou toukad [neini-æn] ka ni-ky-heil-an ti Horodes.
ka tou wæ'i ki ou-vava-toug-an ki ni-pei-alak ta ti Hero-des, ni-rmang-toungtoul ta tatimi-in ti Herodias tou toukad [neini-æn] ka ni-ky-heil-an ti Horodes.
S.TRANS: Maet als de dagh ban Herodis geboorte gehouden wiert danlte de dochte: ban Herodias in het midden [ban haer,] ende sy behaeghde Herodi.
But when Herod's birthday was kept, the daughter of Herodias danced before them, and pleased Herod.
到了希律的生日，希羅底的女兒在眾人面前跳舞，使希律歡喜。

S.FORM: Ka ni-patou-msing faulkut tyni-æn pi'ǣ ki mamang ki toumi-mi-'auh tyn.
Ka ni-patou-msing faulkut tyni-æn pi'ǣ ki mamang ki toumi-mi-'auh tyn.
S.TRANS: Waoatom hy haer met tede beloofde te geben wat sp oock epschen soude.
Whereupon he promised with an oath to give her whatsoever she would ask.
希律就起誓，應許隨她所求的給她。

S.FORM: Teni-râ dou ni-pako-ouro-en matæutæuuh ti Jna tyn, p'æ-ǣnei jau-an, koun tyn, tou tangia ta voung-o ti Joannes ka Tama-æulough.
Teni-râ dou ni-pako-ouro-en matæutæuuh ti Jna tyn, p'æ-ǣnei jau-an, koun tyn, tou tangia ta voung-o ti Joannes ka Tama-æulough.
S.TRANS: Ende sy te boren onderricht zijnde ban hare moeder seyde Geeft mp hie: in een schotel het hooft Joannis des Doopers.
And she, being before instructed of her mother, said, Give me here John Baptist's head in a charger.
女兒被母親所使，就說：「請把施洗約翰的頭放在盤子裏，拿來給我。」

S.FORM: Ka kæuh-boulas ta Si-ba-vau ka Mei-sasou, râ alei ki ni-saoul-kit-tan, alei-appa neini-æn ka mi-sâ; [tyni-æn] mavok, ni-pa-kou-sou-en tyn ka p'hæ-aneih.
Ka kæuh-boulas ta Si-bavau ka Mei-sasou, râ alei ki ni-saoul-kit-tan, alei-appa neini-æn ka mi-sâ; [tyni-æn] mavok, ni-pa-kou-sou-en tyn ka p'hæ-aneih.
S.TRANS: Ende de koning wierdt bedroeft doch om de eeden ende de gene die { met hem} aensacen geboodt hy dat het [haecfoude gegeben worden.
And the king was sorry: nevertheless for the oath's sake, and them which sat with him at meat, he commanded it to be given her.
王便憂愁，但因他所起的誓，又因同席的人，就吩咐給她；

S.FORM: Ka ni-madingi pa-tibbon ki voungo ti Joannes tou sangat.
Ka ni-madingi pa-tibbon ki voungo ti Joannes tou sangat.
S.TRANS: Ende [andt henen ende onchoofde Joannem in den kercke?, _
And he sent, and beheaded John in the prison.
於是打發人去，在監裏斬了約翰，

S.FORM: Ka ni-ad ta voungo tyn tou tangia, ka ni-p'hæn ta tatimi-in, ka ni-mad pou-qua ti Jna-tyn-en.
Ka ni-ad ta voungo tyn tou tangia, ka ni-p'hæn ta tatimi-in, ka ni-mad pou-qua ti Jna-tyn-en.
S.TRANS: Endeshyn hooft werdt gebracht in een schotel ende het dochterken gegeben ende sp droegh het hare moede.
And his head was brought in a charger, and given to the damsel: and she brought it to her mother.
把頭放在盤子裏，拿來給了女子；女子拿去給她母親。

S.FORM: Ka ni-iroua ta Pæhtatæu-tæu-'en tyn, ka ni-ara nein ta vouel tyn, ka ni-ravak nein ta anna: ka ni-mouqua banna-vanna ti Jesus-an.
Ka ni-iroua ta Pæhtatæu-tæu-'en tyn, ka ni-ara nein ta vouel tyn, ka ni-ravak nein ta anna: ka ni-mouqua banna-vanna ti Jesus-an.
S.TRANS: Ende lijne Discipelen quamen ende namen het lichaem wech ende begroeben het selbe:ende gingen ende boodtschapten het Jesu.
And his disciples came, and took up the body, and buried it, and went and told Jesus.
約翰的門徒來，把屍首領去埋葬了，就去告訴耶穌。 （可6‧30－44；路9‧10－17；約6‧1－14）

S.FORM: Ka rou illing-hen ti Jesus [ta anna] ni-tau-avang d'marang hynna mou-snæh tou poulæh tou itou-'nni-en: jrou ka illing-hen ki makoi-lalaulau [ta atta] ni-tau-pourough ta neni tou æuma-æuma smala-dyllough tyni-æn.

Ka rou illing-hen ti Jesus [ta anna] ni-tau-avang d'marang hynna mou-snæh tou poulæh tou itou-'nni-en: jrou ka illing-hen ki makoi-lalaulau [ta atta] ni-tau-pourough ta neni tou æuma-æuma smala-dyllough tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Ende[as] Jesus [dit] hoodde bertrock Hy ban daer te schepe nae een woelte plaecse alleen : ende de charen [dat] hoorende zijn hem re bocte gebolght uyt de lteden
When Jesus heard of it, he departed thence by ship into a desert place apart: and when the people had heard thereof, they followed him on foot out of the cities.
耶穌聽見了，就上船從那裏獨自退到野地裏去。眾人聽見，就從各城裏步行跟隨他。

S.FORM: Irou ka 'tpæpænæh ta ti Jesus ni-k'ytt'an tyn ta makoi-la-laulau ka mabatoung, ka ni-ma-rarÿh maharim neini-æn, ka ni-pa-darykkag-en tyn ta maälam nein.
Irou ka 'tpæpænæh ta ti Jesus ni-k'ytt'an tyn ta makoi-lalaulau ka mabatoung, ka ni-ma-rarÿh maharim neini-æn, ka ni-pa-darykkag-en tyn ta maälam nein.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus uptgaende sagh cen groote schare ende wiert innelick met ontfexminge ober hae beweegt ende genas hare krancken.
And Jesus went forth, and saw a great multitude, and was moved with compassion toward them, and he healed their sick.
耶穌出來，見有許多的人，就憐憫他們，治好了他們的病人。

S.FORM: Irou ka madoung-ato, ni-iroua ta Pahtatæutæu-en tyn tyni-æn, koun, Mapæulapæulah ta itou-quan, ka mali-kaha'to mali-daæua ta kidi: pa-darang-auto ym-hou-an ta makoi-lalaulau, alei ka mouqu'ah tou æuma-æuma peila ki kan-nauh nein.

Irou ka madoung-ato, ni-iroua ta Pahtatæutæu-en tyn tyni-æn, koun, Mapæulapæulah ta itou-quan, ka mali-kaha'to mali-daæua ta kidi: pa-darang-auto ym-hou-an ta makoi-lalaulau, alei ka mouqu'ah tou æuma-æuma peila ki kan-nauh nein.
S.TRANS: Ende als het mu abondt abondt wierdt quamen sijne Discipelen tot hem seggende Dese plactle 18 woelt ende de tijdt is nu boorby gegaen: laet de scharen ban u op dat sp henen gaen in deblecken ende hae: selbe spyse koopen.
And when it was evening, his disciples came to him, saying, This is a desert place, and the time is now past; send the multitude away, that they may go into the villages, and buy themselves victuals.
天將晚的時候，門徒進前來，說：「這是野地，時候已經過了，請叫眾人散開，他們好往村子裏去，自己買吃的。」

S.FORM: Râ ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus nei-ni-æn, Assi pæi-æǣpo-en ka d'ma-rang-ah ta neni: p'hei-'to ki kan-'nauh nein ta emoumi.
Râ ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus nei-ni-æn, Assi pæi-æǣpo-en ka d'ma-rang-ah ta neni: p'hei-'to ki kan-'nauh nein ta emoumi.
S.TRANS: Mae Jesus sepde tot haer Het en 18 haer niet ban noode henen te gaen : geeft ghy haer te eten.
But Jesus said unto them, They need not depart; give ye them to eat.
耶穌說：「不用他們去，你們給他們吃吧！」

S.FORM: Neni-râ ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Aousi-kame hia ki mamang, dyk ryrymma ki paoul, dourouha-appa ki thing.
Neni-râ ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Aousi-kame hia ki mamang, dyk ryrymma ki paoul, dourouha-appa ki thing.
S.TRANS: Doch sy seyden tot hem wWy en hebben hier niet dan byf brooden ende twee billchen,
And they say unto him, We have here but five loaves, and two fishes.
門徒說：「我們這裏只有五個餅，兩條魚。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta teni, Ad-di-koh ki anna pouqua hia.
Ka ni-k'ma ta teni, Ad-di-koh ki anna pouqua hia.
S.TRANS: Endehy sepde Brengt mp deselbe hier.
He said, Bring them hither to me.
耶穌說：「拿過來給我。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-paieroung-en tyn ta makoi-lalaulau tou kouvoul, ka rou ni-ara tyn ta ryrymma ki paoul dourouha-appa ki thung, tou ni-pa-saou-vavullum-en nipaka-riang ki sou: ka rou ni-pihpi tyn, ni-p'-æn tyn ta paoul ki Pahtatæutæu-en, ka Pahtatæutæu-en tyn [ta ni-pæ'ä-tounnoun] ki makoi-lalaulau.

Ka ni-paieroung-en tyn ta makoi-lalaulau tou kouvoul, ka rou ni-ara tyn ta ryrymma ki paoul dourouha-appa ki thung, tou ni-pa-saou-vavullum-en nipaka-riang ki sou: ka rou ni-pihpi tyn, ni-p'-æn tyn ta paoul ki Pahtatæutæu-en, ka Pahtatæutæu-en tyn [ta ni-pæ'ä-tounnoun] ki makoi-lalaulau.
S.TRANS: Ende hy bebal de scharen neder re litten op het gas ende nam de byf brooden ende de twee bisschen eii opwaerts siende nae den Hemel 3regende deselbe:ende als Hyse gebroken hadde gaf hy de brooden den Discipelen eri de Dilcipelen den charen.

And he commanded the multitude to sit down on the grass, and took the five loaves, and the two fishes, and looking up to heaven, he blessed, and brake, and gave the loaves to his disciples, and the disciples to the multitude.
於是吩咐眾人坐在草地上，就拿着這五個餅，兩條魚，望着天祝福，擘開餅，遞給門徒，門徒又遞給眾人。

S.FORM: Ka ni-k-ymmid kman ka mi-bangtau ta neni, ka ni-ara nein ki na pyhpi ka ni-k-da kman, sat kytti-æn 'æb' ki rouha ka la'i-æn ta matt'moej.
Ka ni-k-ymmid kman ka mi-bangtau ta neni, ka ni-ara nein ki na pyhpi ka ni-k-da kman, sat kytti-æn 'æb' ki rouha ka la'i-æn ta matt'moej.
S.TRANS: Ende ly aten alle ende wierden berfadight ende sp namen op het oberschot der brocken twaelf bolle koren.
And they did all eat, and were filled: and they took up of the fragments that remained twelve baskets full.
他們都吃，並且吃飽了，把剩下的零碎收拾起來，裝滿了十二個籃子。

S.FORM: Neni ka ni-kman, na rym-ma ka tounoun-nan lava ta papæ-ræh, dou assi eikoun ta jnæjna ki alalak-appa.
Neni ka ni-kman, na rym-ma ka tounoun-nan lava ta papæ-ræh, dou assi eikoun ta jnæjna ki alalak-appa.
S.TRANS: Ole nt gegeten hadden waren ontrent byf duyfent mannen onder brouwen ende kinderen.
And they that had eaten were about five thousand men, beside women and children.
吃的人，除了婦女孩子，約有五千。 （可6‧45－52；約6‧15－21）

S.FORM: Ka madys ni-mihgarei ta ti Jesus pa-ou-avang ki Pahtatæu-tæuuh-en tyn pasiouro neini-æn pouarough, dou pa-darang-auh tyn ta makoi-lalaulau.
Ka madys ni-mihgarei ta ti Jesus pa-ou-avang ki Pahtatæu-tæuuh-en tyn pasiouro neini-æn pouarough, dou pa-darang-auh tyn ta makoi-lalaulau.
S.TRANS: EnEnde terstondt dwang Jesus sijne Dilcipelen in her schip te gaen ende yoor hem af te baren nae d ande: rhjde teywijle hy de scharen ban | hem soude laten.
And straightway Jesus constrained his disciples to get into a ship, and to go before him unto the other side, while he sent the multitudes away.
耶穌隨即催門徒上船，先渡到那邊去，等他叫眾人散開。

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-pa-darang-en tyn ta makoi-lalaulau, ni-mæddak-kun mou-voukyn tou saät mako-alilid. Irou ka madoung-ato, ni-makoui-saät tou hynna.
Ka rou ni-pa-darang-en tyn ta makoi-lalaulau, ni-mæddak-kun mou-voukyn tou saät mako-alilid. Irou ka madoung-ato, ni-makoui-saät tou hynna.
S.TRANS: Ei als hy nude ccharen ban hem gelaten hadde klam hy op den berg alleen om te bidden. Ende als het nn abondt was geworden soo was hy dae alleen.
And when he had sent the multitudes away, he went up into a mountain apart to pray: and when the evening was come, he was there alone.
散了眾人以後，他就獨自上山去禱告。到了晚上，只有他一人在那裏。

S.FORM: Ka æ'ia-toukad ki vaoung ta avang, ka ni-pa-rako-rakou ki roungwal: alei ka hma-douma ta vare.
Ka æ'ia-toukad ki vaoung ta avang, ka ni-pa-rako-rakou ki roungwal: alei ka hma-douma ta vare.
S.TRANS: Ende her schip was nu midden in de ree zijnde in noodt ban de baren: want de wint was [haer] tegen.
But the ship was now in the midst of the sea, tossed with waves: for the wind was contrary.
那時船在海中，因風不順，被浪搖撼。

S.FORM: Râ tou kaahpat ki souää-jam dou euv'nen, ni-tdarum mou-qua neini-æn ta ti Jefus mou-nau-nang hmi-halap ki [raloum ka tou] vaoung.
Râ tou kaahpat ki souää-jam dou euv'nen, ni-tdarum mou-qua neini-æn ta ti Jefus mou-nau-nang hmi-halap ki [raloum ka tou] vaoung.
S.TRANS: Mae? ter bierder waecke des nachts quam Jesus af tot haer wandelende op de ree,
And in the fourth watch of the night Jesus went unto them, walking on the sea.
夜裏四更天，耶穌在海面上走，往門徒那裏去。

S.FORM: Irou ka kmytta ta Pahta-tæutæu'han tyn ka ounaunang-en tyn hmi-halap ki vaoung, ni-mi-haras-has ki rÿh, koun nein, Tub-bul-lava k'anna: ka ni-hmouhou-wahouwau alei ki takout ta neni.
Irou ka kmytta ta Pahta-tæutæu'han tyn ka ounaunang-en tyn hmi-halap ki vaoung, ni-mi-haras-has ki rÿh, koun nein, Tub-bul-lava k'anna: ka ni-hmouhou-wahouwau alei ki takout ta neni.
S.TRANS: Ende de Discipelen fiende hem op de ree wandelen wierden ontroert seggende Het is een spoocksel ende sy chrreuwdeyu ban breese.
And when the disciples saw him walking on the sea, they were troubled, saying, It is a spirit; and they cried out for fear.
門徒看見他在海面上走，就驚慌了，說：「是個鬼怪！」便害怕，喊叫起來。

S.FORM: Râ madys masousou neini-æn ta ti Jesus, ka koun tyn, Pæh-shuttâ ki rÿh, ti jau k'atta, ynna mahtakout.
Râ madys masousou neini-æn ta ti Jesus, ka koun tyn, Pæh-shuttâ ki rÿh, ti jau k'atta, ynna mahtakout.
S.TRANS: Mae? terstont sprack haer Jesus aen seggende Zyt goedts moedts ick ben het en breelt met. â€œ
But straightway Jesus spake unto them, saying, Be of good cheer; it is I; be not afraid.
耶穌連忙對他們說：「你們放心，是我，不要怕！」

S.FORM: Ka ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Pe-trus k'ma tyni-æn, Meirang, heirou ymhou k'atta, doumiaka pa-ou-qua-i-koh ymhou-an pa-ou-halap ki raloum.
Ka ni-mattæ'i-vli ta ti Pe-trus k'ma tyni-æn, Meirang, heirou ymhou k'atta, doumiaka pa-ou-qua-i-koh ymhou-an pa-ou-halap ki raloum.
S.TRANS: Ende Petrus antwoordde hem ende seyde Heere indien ghy het zijt soo ghebiedt my tot u te komen op het water,
And Peter answered him and said, Lord, if it be thou, bid me come unto thee on the water.
彼得說：「主，如果是你，請叫我從水面上走到你那裏去。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta teni, Ou-qua-au: ka rou ni-mou-rarim ki avang ta ti Petrus, ni-mou-naunang hmi-halap ki raloum alei ki ou-qu'eih tyn ti Jesus-ang.
Ka ni-k'ma ta teni, Ou-qua-au: ka rou ni-mou-rarim ki avang ta ti Petrus, ni-mou-naunang hmi-halap ki raloum alei ki ou-qu'eih tyn ti Jesus-ang.
S.TRANS: Ende hy eyde komt: ende Petrus klam neder ban 't schip ende wandelde op et water om tot Fesum te omen.
And he said, Come. And when Peter was come down out of the ship, he walked on the water, to go to Jesus.
耶穌說：「你來吧。」彼得就從船上下去，在水面上走，要到耶穌那裏去；

S.FORM: irou ka k'ytt'an tyn ta vare ka maligh-da, mahtakout-ato, ka rou mei-nounamou mou-rub, ni-hmouwahouwau, k'ma, Meirang, kadingou-koh.
irou ka k'ytt'an tyn ta vare ka maligh-da, mahtakout-ato, ka rou mei-nounamou mou-rub, ni-hmouwahouwau, k'ma, Meirang, kadingou-koh.
S.TRANS: WMaerxsiende den [tercken windt wierdt hy bebreeft ende als hy begon neder te sincken riep hy. seggende Heere behoudt mp.
But when he saw the wind boisterous, he was afraid; and beginning to sink, he cried, saying, Lord, save me.
只因見風甚大，就害怕，將要沉下去，便喊着說：「主啊，救我！」

S.FORM: Irou ka madys sikkiskih ta ti Jesus ki rima ni-hyhpyt tyni-æn, ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Ousyng-kow ki tna-msing-an, ka'umang ka ni-paka-rallah kow ki rÿh?
Irou ka madys sikkiskih ta ti Jesus ki rima ni-hyhpyt tyni-æn, ka ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Ousyng-kow ki tna-msing-an, ka'umang ka ni-paka-rallah kow ki rÿh?
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus terstont de hant uytltekende greep hem aen ende [eyde tot hem Ghy klepn-geloobige waerom hebt ghy gewanckelts
And immediately Jesus stretched forth his hand, and caught him, and said unto him, O thou of little faith, wherefore didst thou doubt?
耶穌趕緊伸手拉住他，說：「你這小信的人哪，為甚麼疑惑呢？」

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-maddakkun mou-avang ta neni, palungpung-ato ta vare.
Ka rou ni-maddakkun mou-avang ta neni, palungpung-ato ta vare.
S.TRANS: Ende als sy in't chip gheklommen waren ftilde de windt.
And when they were come into the ship, the wind ceased.
他們上了船，風就住了。

S.FORM: Neni-râ ka æ'ia-avang ni-mou-qua tmamud tyni-æn, koun, Missing Alak kow ki Alid.
Neni-râ ka æ'ia-avang ni-mou-qua tmamud tyni-æn, koun, Missing Alak kow ki Alid.
S.TRANS: Die nu in het schip [waren,] quamen ende aenbaden hem seggende Waerlick ghp zijt Godts Sone.
Then they that were in the ship came and worshipped him, saying, Of a truth thou art the Son of God.
在船上的人都拜他，說：「你真是上帝的兒子了。」 （可6‧53－56）

S.FORM: Ka rou tau-avang mou-arough, ni-iroua tou pou-rough ka Gennesareth.
Ka rou tau-avang mou-arough, ni-iroua tou pou-rough ka Gennesareth.
S.TRANS: Ende obe? ghebaren rynde quamen sy m't landt Gennesareth.
And when they were gone over, they came into the land of Gennesaret.
他們過了海，來到革尼撒勒地方。

S.FORM: Ka rou kalang-in ta teni ki pæpæræh ki itou-quam k'anna, ni-madingï tou ryttoung ki ymmid ki pourough ka tou tamang hyn-na, ka ni-ad nein paouqua tyni-æn ta ymmid ka maälam.
Ka rou kalang-in ta teni ki pæpæræh ki itou-quam k'anna, ni-madingï tou ryttoung ki ymmid ki pourough ka tou tamang hyn-na, ka ni-ad nein paouqua tyni-æn ta ymmid ka maälam.
S.TRANS: Ende als de mannen ban die plaetse hem wierden Rennende sonden sy in dat gheheel omligghende landt ende baachten tot hem alle die gualick geltelt waren.
And when the men of that place had knowledge of him, they sent out into all that country round about, and brought unto him all that were diseased;
那裏的人一認出是耶穌，就打發人到周圍地方去，把所有的病人帶到他那裏，

S.FORM: Ka ni-tmou-mimia tyni-æn ka smou-dyk-ah smoukla ki na pa-pytpyt ki koulamough tyn: ka ti-mamang ta ni-smoukla, ni-pada-rikag-en. Ka sasat kytti-æn'æb'ki rymä ki lbægh ki soulat.
Ka ni-tmoumimia tyni-æn ka smou-dyk-ah smoukla ki na pa-pytpyt ki koulamough tyn: ka ti-mamang ta ni-smoukla, ni-pada-rikag-en. Ka sasat kytti-æn'æb'ki rymä ki lbægh ki soulat.
S.TRANS: Ende baden hem dat sy alleenlick den room ijns kleets couden mogen aenraken:ende soo beele als [hem] genraeckten wierden gesont,
And besought him that they might only touch the hem of his garment: and as many as touched were made perfectly whole.
只求耶穌准他們摸他的衣裳繸子；摸着的人就都好了。
